projectDescription: A lightweight Node.js server for transferring files over a local network, secured with JWT authentication and accessible via QR code or password.
keyFeatures: QR code for instant mobile access without password
Random password generated on each server start
Automatic server shutdown when session expires
Streaming file uploads directly to disk (no RAM saturation)
Configurable file size limits and upload directory
Duplicate file name handling with timestamp suffix
publicApiSurface: POST /api/auth — Exchange password for JWT token
GET /api/files — List available files with size and modified date
POST /api/files/upload — Upload one or more files (multipart/form-data)
GET /api/files/download/:filename — Download a file (supports ?token= query param)
